)29‾, 2014 ‾r;:n:r‾‾i1imr‾lflZ ‾ I MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTlFICA nON New Delhi, the 23rd March, 2015 G.S.R. 220(E);-:-In exercise of the powers conferred by section 9 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008, namely.- 1. Short title and commencement. - (1) These rules maybe called the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Coilection) Amendment Rules 窶｢.2015. (2) They shall come into force on the date oftheir-publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules‾2008 (hereinafter referred to as the. principal rules), in rule 2, in sub-rule (1), in clause (0, after the words, figures and brackets ¥
occurring at the end, the words ¥
shall be inserted. 3. In nile 4 of the principal rule, the Explanation after sub-rule 2 shall be omitted. 4. In rule 10 of the principal rules, in sub-rule 1, for the words, brackets and figures ¥

shall be substituted. [F. No. H-25016/01/2014-TolI] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Note: The Principal rules were published in the Gazette ofIndia, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i) published in the Gazette of India vide G.S.R. No. 838 (E) dated the 5th December,2008 and subsequently amended vide G.S.R. No. 950(E) dated the 3rd December, 2010; G.S.R.
